tasks.title: Add unit tests for EVM solver registry validation
tasks.description: Add comprehensive unit tests for EVM escrow solver validation via registry lookup, including error cases and address normalization
tasks.details: The verifier validates EVM escrow solvers by querying the solver registry on the hub chain. We need tests for: successful validation, rejection when solver not registered, rejection when registered EVM address doesn't match escrow reserved_solver, EVM address normalization (case-insensitive, 0x prefix handling), and error handling for network/query failures.
tasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests in trusted-verifier/tests/ that mock the Aptos client and test validate_evm_escrow_solver function with various scenarios including success, failure, and edge cases

subtasks.title: Test successful EVM solver validation
subtasks.description: Test that validate_evm_escrow_solver succeeds when escrow reserved_solver matches registered EVM address
subtasks.details: Create a test that mocks the Aptos client to return a registered EVM address that matches the escrow's reserved_solver. Verify that validation_result.valid is true.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock AptosClient::get_solver_evm_address to return matching address, call validate_evm_escrow_solver, assert valid=true

subtasks.title: Test rejection when solver not registered
subtasks.description: Test that validate_evm_escrow_solver rejects when solver is not found in registry
subtasks.details: Mock AptosClient::get_solver_evm_address to return None. Verify that validation_result.valid is false and message indicates solver not registered.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock get_solver_evm_address to return None, call validate_evm_escrow_solver, assert valid=false with appropriate error message

subtasks.title: Test rejection when EVM addresses don't match
subtasks.description: Test that validate_evm_escrow_solver rejects when registered EVM address doesn't match escrow reserved_solver
subtasks.details: Mock registry to return a different EVM address than the escrow's reserved_solver. Verify validation fails with appropriate error message.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock get_solver_evm_address to return different address, call validate_evm_escrow_solver, assert valid=false

subtasks.title: Test EVM address normalization
subtasks.description: Test that EVM address comparison is case-insensitive and handles 0x prefix correctly
subtasks.details: Test with addresses that differ only in case (e.g., 0xABC vs 0xabc) and with/without 0x prefix. Verify normalization works correctly.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test validate_evm_escrow_solver with addresses in different cases and with/without 0x prefix, verify they match correctly

subtasks.title: Test error handling for registry query failures
subtasks.description: Test that validate_evm_escrow_solver handles network errors and timeouts gracefully
subtasks.details: Mock AptosClient to return errors (network error, timeout). Verify that the function returns Err(anyhow::Error) with appropriate context.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock get_solver_evm_address to return errors, verify function returns Err with context

tasks.title: Add unit tests for expiry time validation
tasks.description: Add unit tests to verify that expired intents are properly rejected in all validation functions
tasks.details: The verifier should reject expired intents in multiple places: validate_intent_safety, validate_intent_fulfillment (in monitor), and when checking fulfillment timestamps. We need tests for: intent expiry check in validate_intent_safety, expiry check in monitor's validate_intent_fulfillment, edge case where intent expires exactly at current time, and fulfillment timestamp validation.
tasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests that set expiry_time to past, present, and future timestamps and verify appropriate rejection/acceptance in each validation function

subtasks.title: Test expired intent rejection in validate_intent_safety
subtasks.description: Test that validate_intent_safety rejects intents with expiry_time in the past
subtasks.details: Create a RequestIntentEvent with expiry_time set to a past timestamp. Call validate_intent_safety and verify that validation_result.valid is false and message indicates intent expired.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent with past expiry_time, call validate_intent_safety, assert valid=false

subtasks.title: Test expiry check in monitor's validate_intent_fulfillment
subtasks.description: Test that monitor's validate_intent_fulfillment rejects escrows when matching intent has expired
subtasks.details: Create an expired intent in cache and an escrow event. Call validate_intent_fulfillment and verify it returns Err with expiry message.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create expired intent in cache, create escrow event, call validate_intent_fulfillment, assert Err with expiry error

subtasks.title: Test edge case: intent expires exactly at current time
subtasks.description: Test behavior when expiry_time equals current timestamp
subtasks.details: Create intent with expiry_time set to current time. Verify whether it's accepted or rejected (should be rejected as expired).
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent with expiry_time = current_time, test validation, verify rejection

subtasks.title: Test fulfillment timestamp validation
subtasks.description: Test that validate_fulfillment rejects fulfillments that occur after intent expiry
subtasks.details: Create an intent with expiry_time and a fulfillment event with timestamp after expiry. Call validate_fulfillment and verify rejection.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent with expiry, fulfillment with later timestamp, call validate_fulfillment, assert valid=false

tasks.title: Add unit tests for offered metadata matching validation
tasks.description: Add unit tests to verify that escrow offered_metadata must exactly match hub intent offered_metadata
tasks.details: The verifier validates that escrow offered_metadata matches hub intent offered_metadata. We need tests for: exact metadata match (success), metadata mismatch (rejection), empty metadata strings, and complex JSON metadata structures.
tasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests in cross_chain_tests.rs that test validate_intent_fulfillment with matching and mismatching metadata in various formats

subtasks.title: Test successful metadata matching
subtasks.description: Test that validation passes when escrow offered_metadata exactly matches hub intent offered_metadata
subtasks.details: Create hub intent and escrow with identical offered_metadata. Call validate_intent_fulfillment and verify validation_result.valid is true.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent and escrow with matching metadata, call validate_intent_fulfillment, assert valid=true

subtasks.title: Test rejection when metadata doesn't match
subtasks.description: Test that validation fails when escrow offered_metadata differs from hub intent offered_metadata
subtasks.details: Create hub intent and escrow with different offered_metadata. Call validate_intent_fulfillment and verify validation_result.valid is false with appropriate error message.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent and escrow with different metadata, call validate_intent_fulfillment, assert valid=false with metadata mismatch message

subtasks.title: Test empty metadata strings
subtasks.description: Test validation with empty metadata strings
subtasks.details: Test that empty metadata strings match correctly (both empty should pass, one empty one not should fail).
subtasks.testStrategy: Test with both empty, one empty, verify correct behavior

subtasks.title: Test complex JSON metadata structures
subtasks.description: Test validation with complex nested JSON metadata
subtasks.details: Create metadata with nested JSON structures, escaped characters, etc. Verify exact string matching (not semantic matching).
subtasks.testStrategy: Create complex JSON metadata, test matching and mismatching, verify exact string comparison

tasks.title: Add unit tests for desired amount validation (must be 0)
tasks.description: Add unit tests to verify that escrow desired_amount must be 0
tasks.details: The verifier validates that escrow desired_amount must be 0 (escrow only holds offered funds, requirement is in hub request intent). We need tests for: validation passes when desired_amount is 0, validation fails when desired_amount is non-zero, and various non-zero values.
tasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests in cross_chain_tests.rs that test validate_intent_fulfillment with desired_amount = 0 and various non-zero values

subtasks.title: Test validation passes when desired_amount is 0
subtasks.description: Test that validation succeeds when escrow desired_amount is 0
subtasks.details: Create hub intent and escrow with desired_amount = 0. Call validate_intent_fulfillment and verify validation_result.valid is true.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent and escrow with desired_amount=0, call validate_intent_fulfillment, assert valid=true

subtasks.title: Test rejection when desired_amount is non-zero
subtasks.description: Test that validation fails when escrow desired_amount is not 0
subtasks.details: Create escrow with desired_amount > 0. Call validate_intent_fulfillment and verify validation_result.valid is false with appropriate error message about desired_amount must be 0.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create escrow with desired_amount > 0, call validate_intent_fulfillment, assert valid=false with error message

subtasks.title: Test various non-zero values
subtasks.description: Test rejection with different non-zero desired_amount values
subtasks.details: Test with small values (1), large values (u64::MAX), and typical values (1000, 1000000). Verify all are rejected.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test with multiple non-zero values, verify all are rejected

tasks.title: Add unit tests for fulfillment validation
tasks.description: Add unit tests for validate_fulfillment function to verify fulfillment meets intent requirements
tasks.details: The validate_fulfillment function checks that fulfillment provided_amount matches intent desired_amount, provided_metadata matches desired_metadata, and fulfillment occurred before intent expiry. We need tests for: all validations passing, amount mismatch, metadata mismatch, fulfillment after expiry, and intent_id mismatch.
tasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests in validator tests (or new fulfillment_tests.rs) that test validate_fulfillment with various scenarios

subtasks.title: Test successful fulfillment validation
subtasks.description: Test that validate_fulfillment succeeds when all conditions are met
subtasks.details: Create intent and fulfillment with matching amounts, metadata, and valid timestamps. Call validate_fulfillment and verify validation_result.valid is true.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create matching intent and fulfillment, call validate_fulfillment, assert valid=true

subtasks.title: Test rejection when provided_amount doesn't match desired_amount
subtasks.description: Test that validate_fulfillment rejects when fulfillment provided_amount differs from intent desired_amount
subtasks.details: Create intent with desired_amount and fulfillment with different provided_amount. Verify validation fails with appropriate error message.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent and fulfillment with mismatched amounts, call validate_fulfillment, assert valid=false

subtasks.title: Test rejection when provided_metadata doesn't match desired_metadata
subtasks.description: Test that validate_fulfillment rejects when fulfillment provided_metadata differs from intent desired_metadata
subtasks.details: Create intent and fulfillment with mismatched metadata. Verify validation fails with appropriate error message.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent and fulfillment with mismatched metadata, call validate_fulfillment, assert valid=false

subtasks.title: Test rejection when fulfillment occurs after expiry
subtasks.description: Test that validate_fulfillment rejects when fulfillment timestamp is after intent expiry_time
subtasks.details: Create intent with expiry_time and fulfillment with timestamp after expiry. Verify validation fails with appropriate error message.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent with expiry, fulfillment with later timestamp, call validate_fulfillment, assert valid=false

subtasks.title: Test rejection when intent_id doesn't match
subtasks.description: Test that validate_fulfillment rejects when fulfillment intent_id differs from intent intent_id
subtasks.details: Create intent and fulfillment with different intent_ids. Verify validation fails with appropriate error message.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent and fulfillment with different intent_ids, call validate_fulfillment, assert valid=false

tasks.title: Add unit tests for solver address matching (Aptos escrows)
tasks.description: Add unit tests to verify that Aptos escrow reserved_solver must match hub intent solver
tasks.details: For Aptos escrows, the verifier validates that escrow reserved_solver matches hub intent solver. We need tests for: successful matching, rejection when addresses don't match, and mismatch scenarios when one has solver and the other doesn't.
tasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests in cross_chain_tests.rs that test validate_intent_fulfillment with matching and mismatching Aptos solver addresses

subtasks.title: Test successful solver address matching
subtasks.description: Test that validation passes when escrow reserved_solver matches hub intent solver for Aptos escrows
subtasks.details: Create hub intent and Aptos escrow with matching solver addresses. Call validate_intent_fulfillment and verify validation_result.valid is true.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent and Aptos escrow with matching solver addresses, call validate_intent_fulfillment, assert valid=true

subtasks.title: Test rejection when solver addresses don't match
subtasks.description: Test that validation fails when escrow reserved_solver differs from hub intent solver
subtasks.details: Create hub intent and Aptos escrow with different solver addresses. Call validate_intent_fulfillment and verify validation_result.valid is false with appropriate error message.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent and Aptos escrow with different solver addresses, call validate_intent_fulfillment, assert valid=false

subtasks.title: Test mismatch when one has solver and other doesn't
subtasks.description: Test validation when intent has solver but escrow doesn't, or vice versa
subtasks.details: Test two scenarios: intent has solver but escrow reserved_solver is None, and escrow has reserved_solver but intent solver is None. Both should fail validation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test both mismatch scenarios, verify both are rejected

tasks.title: Add unit tests for missing/null field handling
tasks.description: Add unit tests for validation when optional fields are missing or mismatched
tasks.details: The verifier handles optional fields like connected_chain_id and solver. We need tests for: when connected_chain_id is None but escrow has chain_id, when connected_chain_id is Some but escrow chain_id doesn't match, and when solver is None in intent but Some in escrow (and vice versa).
tasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests in cross_chain_tests.rs that test validate_intent_fulfillment with various combinations of optional fields

subtasks.title: Test when connected_chain_id is None but escrow has chain_id
subtasks.description: Test validation behavior when intent doesn't specify connected_chain_id but escrow has chain_id
subtasks.details: Create intent with connected_chain_id = None and escrow with chain_id. Verify whether validation passes or fails (should pass as connected_chain_id check is skipped when None).
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent with connected_chain_id=None, escrow with chain_id, call validate_intent_fulfillment, verify behavior

subtasks.title: Test when connected_chain_id doesn't match escrow chain_id
subtasks.description: Test that validation fails when intent connected_chain_id doesn't match escrow chain_id
subtasks.details: Create intent with connected_chain_id = Some(2) and escrow with chain_id = 3. Verify validation fails with appropriate error message.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create intent and escrow with mismatched chain_ids, call validate_intent_fulfillment, assert valid=false

subtasks.title: Test solver field mismatches
subtasks.description: Test validation when solver fields are mismatched (one None, one Some)
subtasks.details: Test scenarios where intent has solver but escrow doesn't, and vice versa. Both should fail validation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test both solver mismatch scenarios, verify both are rejected

tasks.title: Add unit tests for duplicate event handling
tasks.description: Add unit tests to verify that duplicate events are properly handled
tasks.details: The monitor should reject duplicate events (already cached). We need tests for: duplicate escrow events are rejected, duplicate intent events are rejected, and duplicate fulfillment events are handled correctly.
tasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests in monitor_tests.rs that test event caching and duplicate detection

subtasks.title: Test duplicate escrow event rejection
subtasks.description: Test that escrow events with same chain+escrow_id are not added to cache twice
subtasks.details: Add an escrow event to cache, then try to add the same event again. Verify it's not duplicated in the cache.
subtasks.testStrategy: Add escrow event, check cache, add same event again, verify cache size unchanged

subtasks.title: Test duplicate intent event rejection
subtasks.description: Test that intent events with same chain+intent_id are not added to cache twice
subtasks.details: Add an intent event to cache, then try to add the same event again. Verify it's not duplicated.
subtasks.testStrategy: Add intent event, check cache, add same event again, verify cache size unchanged

subtasks.title: Test duplicate fulfillment event handling
subtasks.description: Test that duplicate fulfillment events don't generate multiple approvals
subtasks.details: Process a fulfillment event that generates approval, then process the same fulfillment again. Verify only one approval exists.
subtasks.testStrategy: Process fulfillment, check approval, process same fulfillment again, verify single approval

tasks.title: Add unit tests for approval generation edge cases
tasks.description: Add unit tests for edge cases in approval generation logic
tasks.details: The monitor generates approvals when fulfillments are observed. We need tests for: approval is not generated twice for same escrow, approval generation when escrow exists but intent doesn't, and approval generation when fulfillment exists but escrow doesn't.
tasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests in monitor_tests.rs that test validate_and_approve_fulfillment with various edge cases

subtasks.title: Test approval is not generated twice
subtasks.description: Test that calling validate_and_approve_fulfillment twice for same escrow doesn't create duplicate approvals
subtasks.details: Process a fulfillment that generates approval, then process the same fulfillment again. Verify only one approval exists and second call doesn't error.
subtasks.testStrategy: Process fulfillment twice, verify single approval exists

subtasks.title: Test approval generation when escrow exists but intent doesn't
subtasks.description: Test error handling when fulfillment references intent_id that doesn't exist in cache
subtasks.details: Add escrow to cache but no matching intent. Process fulfillment. Verify appropriate error is returned.
subtasks.testStrategy: Add escrow without intent, process fulfillment, assert error

subtasks.title: Test approval generation when fulfillment exists but escrow doesn't
subtasks.description: Test error handling when fulfillment references escrow that doesn't exist
subtasks.details: Process fulfillment for intent_id that has no matching escrow in cache. Verify error is returned (already tested in test_returns_error_when_no_matching_escrow, but verify it's comprehensive).
subtasks.testStrategy: Process fulfillment without escrow, assert error (may already be covered)
